text:
/mn19 /ci1 2 あたしに聞かないでよ。
浮かれてるんじゃない？
アークスも、敵も。

/mn15 /ci2 2 t5 なんとか抜け出せたわね。
手伝ってくれて、ありがとう。

/mn5 ……不甲斐ないけど、ここまでね。
先に退かせてもらうわ。
/mn7 ちょっと手を抜きすぎたわね……

/mn19 /ci1 2 Don't ask me! Guess everyone's feeling
themselves? ARKS and the enemy both...

/mn15 /ci2 2 t5 Not sure how, but we got through it!
Thanks for helping us.

/mn5 ...I know it's cowardly, but this is as far as we
go. Retreating now.
/mn7 Guess I shoulda taken this more seriously...
/mn2 Gah! Ahhh I can't believe how annoying you are!
